user.title: Lidl Plus
user.description: Enter your Lidl Plus credentials. Get a refresh token by running `./lidl-plus.sh auth --debug` on your computer.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid refresh token. Run `./lidl-plus.sh auth --debug` to get a new one.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Lidl Plus API. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Lidl Plus account is already configured.

activate_all_coupons.description: Activates all available Lidl Plus coupons.
